---
title: "Volume 1 — Foundations of LLM Inference"
---

# Volume 1 — Foundations of LLM Inference

This volume explains how LLM inference works from first principles.

## Chapters

1. The Inference Revolution
2. Anatomy of an Inference Request
3. Tokens and Tokenization
4. Transformer Inference
5. Prefill and Decode
6. The KV Cache
7. Inference Performance Metrics
8. GPU Foundations
